name: Proxy Execution via Explorer
description: Detects the use of explorer.exe from cmd.exe to proxy execution, a technique used to bypass security restrictions.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the child process that was spawned (expected to be 'explorer.exe').

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the explorer.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute explorer.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which explorer.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process, which should be 'cmd.exe'.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (cmd.exe).
